name: Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 cups frozen broccoli cuts, thawed and cooked
12 ounces tuna in water, drained and flaked
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bow tie pasta according to package directions; drain and cool.
2. Add the peas, bell peppers, onions, broccoli, and tuna to the cooled pasta.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine vinegar, hot sauce, honey, salt, garlic powder, ginger, and black pepper.
4. Pour the dressing over the pasta mixture.
5. Toss lightly.
6. Cover and chill until ready to serve.
